item.title: Jim Jordan Stumps Tim Walz With a Simple Question: ‘Court Is Lying or You’re Lying?’
item.description: Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz previously said a court required the state to continue paying one of the charities at the center of a massive fraud... Read Mo...

item.title: White House: Spain Has Agreed to Cooperate With US Military
item.description: WASHINGTON, March 4 (Reuters)—Spain has agreed to cooperate with the U.S. military, White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt said on Wednesday, a ...

item.title: Minneapolis Autism Center CEO Pleads Guilty to Fraud, Says He Never Met a Person With the Condition
item.description: The Minneapolis CEO of a center to serve patients with Autism Spectrum Disorder reportedly confessed that he did not know a single person with autism....

item.title: Polls Suggest Public Opinion Improving Over Iran Operation
item.description: Public opinion about President Donald Trump’s military operation in Iran could be improving, with a new poll showing 56% of likely voters support the ...
